  - `Prisma` namespace imported as `import type { Prisma } from "@yelli/db"` (db re-exports `* from "@prisma/client"`); keeps `@prisma/client` out of web-app direct deps. Same architectural principle as Sub-A1's AWS SDK quarantine.
  - Verified: tsc 0 errors, vitest 25/25 (19 sharedFiles + 6 whiteboardSnapshots), eslint 0 errors/warnings on 3 changed files. No `as any`/`@ts-ignore`.

    `plan-limit.ts` imports `MiddlewareResult` from `@trpc/server/unstable-core-do-not-import`.
    Path is officially discouraged but is the canonical type. Custom adapter alternative = more code + more drift surface.

🎯 **Overlay Cluster** — In-Call File Sharing + Whiteboard

   PRE-FLIGHT FINDING (this session, 2026-05-29):
   The data + types + plan-capability layer is ALREADY DONE from prior scaffolding:
   - `SharedFile` Prisma model exists `schema.prisma:603-627` (includes `is_persisted`, `expires_at`, guest uploader support).
   - `WhiteboardSnapshot` Prisma model exists `schema.prisma:638-654`.
   - Zod schemas exist `packages/shared/src/schemas/{sharedFile,whiteboardSnapshot}.ts`.
   - `PLAN_LIMITS.filePersistence` + `.whiteboardPersistence` capability keys exist in `packages/shared/src/plan-limits.ts:15-16,32-33` (free=false, pro/enterprise=true).
   - Relations wired in Organization/User/Meeting.
   - Component stubs exist: `in-call-file-dropzone.tsx` (163L), `in-call-whiteboard.tsx` (141L, local-only with comment "broadcast is a follow-up"), `meeting-room.tsx` already mounts whiteboardOpen toggle.
   - Storage primitives ready: `packages/storage/src/{keys,client,mime}.ts` — `buildStorageKey(orgId, entityType, filename)`, `MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES=100MB`, presigned URLs.
   - Plan-tier middleware ready: `apps/web/src/server/trpc/middleware/plan-limit.ts:54` exports `requirePlanCapability(feature)`.
   - Socket org-channel pattern proven: `joinOrgChannel(socket, eventType)` + `${orgId}:${eventType}` channel naming.

   LOCKED DECISIONS (this session):
   - Free-tier file sharing: **socket-only broadcast** (base64 payload, server-side ≤2MB cap, no DB, no MinIO). Files larger than cap show "Upgrade to share large files" UI. (human-confirmed via AskUserQuestion 2026-05-29)
   - WhiteboardSnapshot persistence sub-task: placed in Sub-A2 (symmetric data layer) NOT Sub-D (Opus judgment, human delegated).
   - Whiteboard realtime: org-channel + payload `meetingId` filter (per chat realtime pattern locked 2026-05-25 — `[[realtime-chat-org-channel-with-client-filter]]`).
   - Plan capabilities reused as-is: `filePersistence` gates paid-tier shared-file persistence; `whiteboardPersistence` gates paid-tier whiteboard snapshot save. No new capability keys.

   DECOMPOSITION (6 sub-sessions, each ≤500L Sonnet output per V32 R2; TaskCreate tasks #1-6):
   - **Sub-A1** — `sharedFiles` tRPC router + tests (~340L). requestUpload/commit/listByMeeting/getDownloadUrl/softDelete. All `requirePlanCapability("filePersistence")`. Reference shape: `recordings.ts:184-318`.

   - **Sub-D** — Client wiring `in-call-whiteboard.tsx`: realtime strokes + cursors + paid-tier save button + tests (~400L).
